title: Emerald expansion
body:
Curseforge page:https: //www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/emerald-expansion-mod-eem

This mod adds a new set of wood, emerald wood that can be used for all the normal wood stuff exept trapdoors and doors. it also adds a set of emerald tools, armour, a trident recpie, a emerald bow, op tools, op ore with op ore block, 3 new mobs, the emerald golem, emerald chicken and a emerald pig. the emerald chincken drops a feather, the emerald golem drops a emerald block and the emerald pig drops a emerald porkchop. it also adds the emerald apple, a much more powerfull version of the enchanted golden apple. it also add 2 new potions, the anoying potion and the potion of death. all this plus a new dimension, a emerald villager, op tools wich can be crafted from op ingots anda a new structure: the emerald tempel. for the rest check out the art gallery where alld the things will be. (i know that some have the wrong name but i mispeld them when making them)
